title: Evaluation-Time Constancy Inference for Transport in Cubical Type Theory (Lean 4 artifact)
description: Artifact for the paper 'Evaluation-Time Constancy Inference for Transport in Cubical Type Theory': a self-contained CCHM-style cubical type theory kernel in Lean 4 (NbE evaluator with a read-back-exact transport constancy check, bidirectional type checker, De Morgan interval with antichain-DNF decision procedure, Glue/univalence, higher inductive types), the machine-checked strictness catalogue and switchover experiments (LibStrictness.lean, LibSwitchover.lean), a ~300-definition object-language library, and a differential-testing harness. See ARTIFACT.md for the build instructions and the paper-to-probe correspondence table.
